qa_pairs.question: Who automatically receives access to a Principal Investigator's (PI) Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) award on Alliance general-purpose clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: By default, every user sponsored by the PI through their Alliance CCDB registration has access to the RAC award. Additionally, any co-PIs listed on the RAC application will also have access.

qa_pairs.question: How can a Principal Investigator (PI) select specific users to access their Resource Allocation Project (RAP) allocation on Alliance general-purpose clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: To select which users can access an allocation, the PI must log in to the Alliance CCDB portal at https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/. From the 'My Account' menu, they should select 'Manage RAP Memberships'. On the subsequent page, they can choose the relevant Resource Allocation Project (RAP) from the drop-down list to add or modify members.
